name: studio.get_site
description: Read a single Actium Studio site's metadata (name, plan, custom domain, status, urls) by site_id.
whenToUse: Read-before-write safety check: confirm a site exists and its status before editing.
Fetch the site's public URL or custom domain for inclusion in a reply to the user.
Disambiguate two similarly-named sites by fetching full metadata for each candidate id.
whenNotToUse: Caller does not yet know the site_id — call studio.list_sites first and select the target id.
Caller needs pages, not the site object — use studio.list_pages or studio.get_page.
Caller wants a composite health check with scaffold progress and staging — use studio.site_status instead (it batches 2-3 calls).
